init_eqs_str: a['basseffect'] = 0; a['beat'] = 0; a['foo'] = 0; a['beatcount'] = 0; a['initframe'] = 0; a['rozzorrate'] = 0;
frame_eqs_str: a['warp']=0; a['dx']=(a['dx']-0.0005); a['dy']=(a['dy']-0.0005); a['basseffect']=Math.max((Math.max(a['bass'], a['bass_att'])-1), 0); a['mv_y']=(4-Math.min((((a['bass_att']+a['bass'])-2)*0.25), 0.9)); a['mv_r']=(a['basseffect']*4); a['mv_b']=(a['basseffect']*3); a['mv_g']=(a['basseffect']*3.5); a['wave_y']=((Math.abs(a['beat'])>0.00001)?(0.5):(0.4)); a['ib_a']=a['foo']; a['beatcount']=(a['beatcount']+a['beat']); a['initframe']=((Math.abs(below(a['beatcount'], 1))>0.00001)?(a['frame']):(a['initframe'])); a['rozzorrate']=div((a['frame']-a['initframe']),a['beatcount']); a['monitor']=a['rozzorrate'];
